description:
In the image, a man is seated at a wooden table in what appears to be a living room. He's wearing a blue shirt and black shorts adorned with white patterns. His attention seems to be divided between his laptop, which he holds open on the table, and a glass of water placed beside it. 

The room around him is minimally furnished, featuring a beige couch that contrasts with the white wall in the background. A window punctuates this wall, allowing a glimpse of the world outside. The overall atmosphere suggests a quiet moment of work or study at home.
